panels.speaker: narrator
panels.hindi: Maya hotel Surya dhoond rahi hai. Use kuchh pata nahi hai ki kahaan hai.
panels.english: Maya is looking for the Hotel Surya. She has no idea where it is.
panels.pronunciation: MA-ya ho-TEL SUR-ya DHOOND ra-HI hai. U-se KUCHH PA-ta na-HI hai ki ka-HAAN hai

panels.speaker: shopkeeper1
panels.hindi: Seedha jaao, phir left. Bilkul saamne hai.
panels.english: Go straight, then left. It's right in front.
panels.pronunciation: SEE-dha jaao, PHIR left. BIL-kul SAAM-ne hai

panels.speaker: shopkeeper2
panels.hindi: Arrey nahi! Right le lo. Main bhi wahaan jaata hoon.
panels.english: Oh no! Take a right. I go there too.
panels.pronunciation: a-REY na-HI! Right le LO. MAIN bhi wa-HAAN JAA-ta hoon

panels.speaker: child
panels.hindi: Auntie, mere papa wahaan kaam karte hain. Main le chalti hoon.
panels.english: Auntie, my papa works there. I'll take you.
panels.pronunciation: AUN-tie, ME-re PA-pa wa-HAAN KAAM KAR-te hain. MAIN le CHAL-ti hoon

panels.speaker: narrator
panels.hindi: Maya ab parivar ka hissa hai.
panels.english: Maya is now part of the family.
panels.pronunciation: MA-ya ab pa-ri-VAAR ka HIS-sa hai
